sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116152" key="w)leni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠλεν-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116152.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mat</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bundle,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:170" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.170</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
